mustFailWhen: feat input sourceAuthority is generated output/report, rawAdrDirectAuthority is true, or implements.json is treated as definition authority
environmentBuildDefinition lacks officialOutput, requiredOutputs, runtimeRequirements, and at least one requiredCheck or requiredCommand, or requiredCommands assume specs-main
a package adds an abstraction layer before activationCriteria or a concrete reused responsibility exists
requiredGate: future-only package remains planned-blocked until activation criteria are met

mustFailWhen: multiple active packages provide the same capability without factorization-allowance.v1
requiredGate: duplicate provides rejected unless explicitly allowed

mustFailWhen: one package owns unrelated reasons to change, or an adapter owns core/domain authority
requiredGate: single responsibility and boundary ownership review

mustFailWhen: unused future surface is accepted/ready instead of planned-blocked with activationCriteria
old and successor package/repo remain active for the same responsibility, output, or provide capability without a disposition record
pre-update and post-update definitions both remain active, or accepted package keeps active allowedPaths/requiredCommands to a retired path
requiredGate: projection digest and retired-path active-field check

mustFailWhen: production implementation is placed in specs/governance contract records instead of the successor feat repo, unless the package role is an explicit governance/tooling record package
generated aggregate feat-input, per-package feat-input, or projection-digest differs from package-contract projection
